metadata.significance: Stories of prophets and their opposition, ends with poets' description

translations.en_sahih: Ta, Seen, Meem.
translations.en_yusufali: Ta. Sin. Mim.
translations.ms_basmeih: Taa, Siin, Miim.

translations.en_sahih: These are the verses of the clear Book.
translations.en_yusufali: These are verses of the Book that makes (things) clear.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ini ialah ayat-ayat Kitab (Al-Quran) yang jelas nyata.

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallaka bakhiAAun nafsaka alla yakoonoo mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Perhaps, [O Muhammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: It may be thou frettest thy soul with grief, that they do not become Believers.
translations.ms_basmeih: Jangan-jangan pula engkau (wahai Muhammad), membinasakan dirimu dengan menanggung dukacita, kerana mereka tidak menjadi orang-orang yang beriman.

ayahs.arabic: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: In nasha nunazzil AAalayhim mina alssamai ayatan fathallat aAAnaquhum laha khadiAAeena

translations.en_sahih: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled.
translations.en_yusufali: If (such) were Our Will, We could send down to them from the sky a Sign, to which they would bend their necks in humility.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kalau Kami mahu, tentulah Kami akan turunkan kepada mereka satu mukjizat dari langit, yang menjadikan mereka tunduk kepadanya.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yateehim min thikrin mina alrrahmani muhdathin illa kanoo AAanhu muAArideena

translations.en_sahih: And no revelation comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it.
translations.en_yusufali: But there comes not to them a newly-revealed Message from (Allah) Most Gracious, but they turn away therefrom.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tidak datang kepada mereka peringatan serta pengajaran yang baharu dari (Allah) Ar-Rahman, melainkan mereka tetap berpaling mengingkarinya.

ayahs.arabic: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqad kaththaboo fasayateehim anbao ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona

translations.en_sahih: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule.
translations.en_yusufali: They have indeed rejected (the Message): so they will know soon (enough) the truth of what they mocked at!
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh kerana mereka telah mendustakan Al-Quran, maka sudah tentu akan datang kepada mereka berita-berita (azab) mengenai perkara yang mereka ejek-ejek itu.

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yaraw ila alardi kam anbatna feeha min kulli zawjin kareemin

translations.en_sahih: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind?
translations.en_yusufali: Do they not look at the earth,- how many noble things of all kinds We have produced therein?
translations.ms_basmeih: Masihkah mereka berdegil dan tidak memperhatikan bumi, berapa banyak kami tumbuhkan padanya dari berbagai jenis tanaman yang memberi banyak manfaat?

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya pada yang demikian itu terdapat satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan dan rahmat pengurniaan Allah); dan (dalam pada itu), kebanyakan mereka tidak juga beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily, thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad) Dia lah sahaja Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waith nada rabbuka moosa ani iti alqawma alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people -
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, thy Lord called Moses: "Go to the people of iniquity,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika Tuhanmu menyeru Nabi Musa: "Hendaklah engkau mendatangi kaum yang zalim, -

translations.en_sahih: The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear Allah?"
translations.en_yusufali: "The people of the Pharaoh: will they not fear Allah?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Iaitu kaum Firaun; tidakkah mereka mahu mengawal diri dari kemurkaanKu?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi innee akhafu an yukaththibooni

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "O my Lord! I do fear that they will charge me with falsehood:
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa merayu dengan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku, sesungguhnya aku takut bahawa mereka akan mendustakan daku.

ayahs.arabic: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَـٰرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wayadeequ sadree wala yantaliqu lisanee faarsil ila haroona

translations.en_sahih: And that my breast will tighten and my tongue will not be fluent, so send for Aaron.
translations.en_yusufali: "My breast will be straitened. And my speech may not go (smoothly): so send unto Aaron.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan akan sempit pula dadaku serta tidak lancar lidahku; oleh itu utuskanlah perintahMu kepada Harun (supaya ia membantuku).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Walahum AAalayya thanbun faakhafu an yaqtulooni

translations.en_sahih: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me."
translations.en_yusufali: "And (further), they have a charge of crime against me; and I fear they may slay me."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan lagi mereka ada mengemukakan satu tuduhan jenayah terhadapku; oleh itu aku takut mereka akan membunuhku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kalla faithhaba biayatina inna maAAakum mustamiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening.
translations.en_yusufali: Allah said: "By no means! proceed then, both of you, with Our Signs; We are with you, and will listen (to your call).
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Jangan! Jangan fikir (akan berlaku apa yang engkau bimbangkan itu)! Oleh itu pergilah kamu berdua membawa mukjizat-mukjizat Kami (yang membuktikan kebenaran kamu); sesungguhnya Kami ada bersama-sama kamu: mendengar.

ayahs.arabic: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatiya firAAawna faqoola inna rasoolu rabbi alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: Go to Pharaoh and say, 'We are the messengers of the Lord of the worlds,
translations.en_yusufali: "So go forth, both of you, to Pharaoh, and say: 'We have been sent by the Lord and Cherisher of the worlds;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka pergilah kamu kepada Firaun, kemudian katakanlah kepadanya: sesungguhnya kami adalah utusan Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: [Commanded to say], "Send with us the Children of Israel."'"
translations.en_yusufali: "'Send thou with us the Children of Israel.'"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Menyuruhmu membebaskan kaum Bani Israil mengikut kami".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala alam nurabbika feena waleedan walabithta feena min AAumurika sineena

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you remained among us for years of your life?
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said: "Did we not cherish thee as a child among us, and didst thou not stay in our midst many years of thy life?
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun menjawab: "Bukankah kami telah memeliharamu dalam kalangan kami semasa engkau kanak-kanak yang baharu lahir, serta engkau telah tinggal dalam kalangan kami beberapa tahun dari umurmu?

ayahs.arabic: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WafaAAalta faAAlataka allatee faAAalta waanta mina alkafireena

translations.en_sahih: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful."
translations.en_yusufali: "And thou didst a deed of thine which (thou knowest) thou didst, and thou art an ungrateful (wretch)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (bukankah) engkau telah melakukan satu perbuatan (jenayah) yang telah engkau lakukan dan (dengan itu) engkau dari orang-orang yang tidak mengenang budi?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala faAAaltuha ithan waana mina alddalleena

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray.
translations.en_yusufali: Moses said: "I did it then, when I was in error.
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa berkata: "Aku melakukan perbuatan yang demikian sedang aku ketika itu dari orang-orang yang belum mendapat petunjuk.

ayahs.arabic: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fafarartu minkum lamma khiftukum fawahaba lee rabbee hukman wajaAAalanee mina almursaleena

translations.en_sahih: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me wisdom and prophethood and appointed me [as one] of the messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: "So I fled from you (all) when I feared you; but my Lord has (since) invested me with judgment (and wisdom) and appointed me as one of the messengers.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Lalu aku melarikan diri dari kamu, ketika aku merasa takut kepada kamu; kemudian Tuhanku mengurniakan daku ilmu pengetahuan ugama, dan menjadikan daku seorang RasulNya.

ayahs.arabic: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.transliteration: Watilka niAAmatun tamunnuha AAalayya an AAabbadta banee israeela

translations.en_sahih: And is this a favor of which you remind me - that you have enslaved the Children of Israel?"
translations.en_yusufali: "And this is the favour with which thou dost reproach me,- that thou hast enslaved the Children of Israel!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan budimu memeliharaku yang engkau bangkit-bangkitkan itu adalah kerana engkau telah bertindak memperhambakan kaum Bani Israil.

translations.en_sahih: Said Pharaoh, "And what is the Lord of the worlds?"
translations.en_yusufali: Pharaoh said: "And what is the 'Lord and Cherisher of the worlds'?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata (dengan sombongnya): "Dan apa dia Tuhan sekalian alam itu?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced."
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "The Lord and Cherisher of the heavens and the earth, and all between,- if ye want to be quite sure."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab. "Dia lah yang memiliki dan mentadbirkan langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di antara keduanya, - kalaulah kamu mahu mendapat keyakinan dengan berdalil maka inilah jalannya".

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said to those around him, "Do you not hear?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said to those around: "Did ye not listen (to what he says)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata kepada orang-orang yang ada di sekelilingnya: "Tidakkah kamu dengar (apa yang dikatakan olehnya)?"

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers."
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "Your Lord and the Lord of your fathers from the beginning!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menegaskan lagi: "Dia lah Tuhan yang memiliki dan memelihara kamu dan Tuhan datuk nenek kamu yang telah lalu."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala inna rasoolakumu allathee orsila ilaykum lamajnoonun

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "Indeed, your 'messenger' who has been sent to you is mad."
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said: "Truly your messenger who has been sent to you is a veritable madman!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata (kepada orang-orangnya): "Sebenarnya Rasul yang diutuskan kepada kamu ini, sungguh gila?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi wama baynahuma in kuntum taAAqiloona

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason."
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "Lord of the East and the West, and all between! if ye only had sense!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa (menerangkan lagi tentang keesaan Allah dan kekuasaanNya dengan) berkata: "Dia lah yang memiliki dan menguasai timur dan barat serta segala yang ada di antara keduanya; kalau kamu orang-orang yang berakal tentulah memahamiNya!"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَـٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala laini ittakhathta ilahan ghayree laajAAalannaka mina almasjooneena

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "If you take a god other than me, I will surely place you among those imprisoned."
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said: "If thou dost put forward any god other than me, I will certainly put thee in prison!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata: "Demi sesungguhnya! Jika engkau menyembah Tuhan yang lain daripadaku, sudah tentu aku akan menjadikan engkau dari orang-orang yang dipenjarakan".

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you proof manifest?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "Even if I showed you something clear (and) convincing?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Adakah (engkau akan memenjarakan daku juga) walau pun aku membawa kepadamu sesuatu bukti yang jelas nyata?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fati bihi in kunta mina alssadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "Then bring it, if you should be of the truthful."
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said: "Show it then, if thou tellest the truth!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata: "Kalau demikian, bawalah bukti itu jika betul engkau dari orang-orang yang benar".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqa AAasahu faitha hiya thuAAbanun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest.
translations.en_yusufali: So (Moses) threw his rod, and behold, it was a serpent, plain (for all to see)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa pun mencampakkan tongkatnya, maka tiba-tiba tongkatnya itu menjadi seekor ular yang jelas nyata.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WanazaAAa yadahu faitha hiya baydao lilnnathireena

translations.en_sahih: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers.
translations.en_yusufali: And he drew out his hand, and behold, it was white to all beholders!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ia mengeluarkan tangannya, maka tiba-tiba tangannya menjadi putih (bersinar-sinar) bagi orang-orang yang melihatnya.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَسَـٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lilmalai hawlahu inna hatha lasahirun AAaleemun

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said to the eminent ones around him, "Indeed, this is a learned magician.
translations.en_yusufali: (Pharaoh) said to the Chiefs around him: "This is indeed a sorcerer well-versed:
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata kepada ketua-ketua kaum yang ada dikelilingnya: "Sesungguhnya orang ini (Musa) ialah seorang ahli sihir yang mahir.

ayahs.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yureedu an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihi famatha tamuroona

translations.en_sahih: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise?"
translations.en_yusufali: "His plan is to get you out of your land by his sorcery; then what is it ye counsel?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Ia bertujuan hendak mengeluarkan kamu dari negeri kamu dengan sihirnya, maka apa yang kamu syorkan?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo arjih waakhahu waibAAath fee almadaini hashireena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Keep him and his brother in suspense (for a while), and dispatch to the Cities heralds to collect-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata: "Tangguhkanlah dahulu (sebarang tindakan) terhadapnya dan terhadap saudaranya, serta hantarkanlah ke bandar-bandar (negeri Mesir) orang-orang yang mengumpulkan (ahli-ahli sihir),

translations.en_sahih: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician."
translations.en_yusufali: "And bring up to thee all (our) sorcerers well-versed."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Supaya mereka membawa kepadamu segala ahli sihir yang mahir".

translations.en_sahih: So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day.
translations.en_yusufali: So the sorcerers were got together for the appointment of a day well-known,
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu dikumpulkanlah ahli-ahli sihir itu pada satu masa yang ditentukan, pada hari (perayaan) yang termaklum.

translations.en_sahih: And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate
translations.en_yusufali: And the people were told: "Are ye (now) assembled?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan dikatakan kepada orang ramai: "Berkumpulah kamu semuanya;.

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallana nattabiAAu alssaharata in kanoo humu alghalibeena

translations.en_sahih: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant?"
translations.en_yusufali: "That we may follow the sorcerers (in religion) if they win?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Semoga kita (tetap) mengikut (ugama) ahli-ahli sihir itu kiranya merekalah orang-orang yang menang".

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma jaa alssaharatu qaloo lifirAAawna ainna lana laajran in kunna nahnu alghalibeena

translations.en_sahih: And when the magicians arrived, they said to Pharaoh, "Is there indeed for us a reward if we are the predominant?"
translations.en_yusufali: So when the sorcerers arrived, they said to Pharaoh: "Of course - shall we have a (suitable) reward if we win?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ketika ahli-ahli sihir itu datang, berkatalah mereka kepada Firaun: "Benarkah kami akan beroleh upah, kiranya kamilah orang-orang yang menang?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala naAAam wainnakum ithan lamina almuqarrabeena

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Yea, (and more),- for ye shall in that case be (raised to posts) nearest (to my person)."
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun menjawab: "Benar, (kamu akan mendapatnya) dan sesungguhnya kamu dengan itu akan menjadi dari orang-orang yang dekat kepadaku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lahum moosa alqoo ma antum mulqoona

translations.en_sahih: Moses said to them, "Throw whatever you will throw."
translations.en_yusufali: Moses said to them: "Throw ye - that which ye are about to throw!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa berkata kepada mereka: "Campakkanlah dahulu apa yang kamu hendak campakkan".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqaw hibalahum waAAisiyyahum waqaloo biAAizzati firAAawna inna lanahnu alghaliboona

translations.en_sahih: So they threw their ropes and their staffs and said, "By the might of Pharaoh, indeed it is we who are predominant."
translations.en_yusufali: So they threw their ropes and their rods, and said: "By the might of Pharaoh, it is we who will certainly win!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu mereka mencampakkan tali-tali dan tongkat-tongkat mereka sambil berkata: "Demi kekuasaan Firaun, sesungguhnya sudah tetap kamilah orang-orang yang akan menang".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqa moosa AAasahu faitha hiya talqafu ma yafikoona

translations.en_sahih: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified.
translations.en_yusufali: Then Moses threw his rod, when, behold, it straightway swallows up all the falsehoods which they fake!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Nabi Musa pula mencampakkan tongkatnya, tiba-tiba tongkatnya itu menelan apa yang mereka pura-pura adakan (dengan sihir mereka).

translations.en_sahih: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: Then did the sorcerers fall down, prostrate in adoration,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (kemenangan Nabi Musa menjadikan) ahli-ahli sihir itu segera merebahkan diri: sujud,

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,
translations.en_yusufali: Saying: "We believe in the Lord of the Worlds,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sambil berkata: "Kami beriman kepada Tuhan sekalian alam,

translations.en_sahih: The Lord of Moses and Aaron."
translations.en_yusufali: "The Lord of Moses and Aaron."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tuhan Nabi Musa dan Nabi Harun".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falasawfa taAAlamoona laoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed Moses before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic, but you are going to know. I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will surely crucify you all."
translations.en_yusufali: Said (Pharaoh): "Believe ye in Him before I give you permission? surely he is your leader, who has taught you sorcery! but soon shall ye know! Be sure I will cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will cause you all to die on the cross!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Firaun berkata: "Patutkah kamu beriman kepadanya sebelum aku izinkan kamu? Sesungguhnya dia lah (Musa) ketua kamu yang mengajar kamu ilmu sihir; oleh itu kamu akan mengetahui kelak (akibatnya). Demi sesungguhnya, aku akan memotong tangan dan kaki kamu dengan bersilang kemudian aku akan memalang kamu semuanya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la dayra inna ila rabbina munqaliboona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return.
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "No matter! for us, we shall but return to our Lord!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "(Ugutanmu itu) tidaklah menjadi hal! Sesungguhnya kami (tidak gentar), kerana kepada Tuhan kamilah kembalinya kami.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna natmaAAu an yaghfira lana rabbuna khatayana an kunna awwala almumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers."
translations.en_yusufali: "Only, our desire is that our Lord will forgive us our faults, that we may become foremost among the believers!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya kami amat berharap supaya Tuhan Kami mengampunkan dosa-dosa kami, kerana kamilah orang-orang yang mula-mula beriman (dalam peristiwa ini)".

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waawhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee innakum muttabaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued."
translations.en_yusufali: By inspiration we told Moses: "Travel by night with my servants; for surely ye shall be pursued."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Allah berfirman): Dan Kami wahyukan kepada Nabi Musa: "Hendaklah engkau membawa hamba-hambaKu (kaummu) keluar pada waktu malam; sesungguhnya kamu akan dikejar (oleh Firaun dan tenteranya)".

translations.en_sahih: Then Pharaoh sent among the cities gatherers
translations.en_yusufali: Then Pharaoh sent heralds to (all) the Cities,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah mengetahui keadaan itu) maka Firaun mengutus (orang-orangnya) ke bandar-bandar (negeri Mesir), untuk mengumpulkan (tenteranya),

translations.en_sahih: [And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band,
translations.en_yusufali: (Saying): "These (Israelites) are but a small band,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sambil berkata kepada mereka): "Sesungguhnya orang-orang (Musa) itu adalah segolongan kecil,

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, they are enraging us,
translations.en_yusufali: "And they are raging furiously against us;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya mereka melakukan perkara yang menyebabkan kita marah;.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, we are a cautious society... "
translations.en_yusufali: "But we are a multitude amply fore-warned."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya kita sekalian, sentiasa beringat dan berjaga-jaga".

translations.en_sahih: So We removed them from gardens and springs
translations.en_yusufali: So We expelled them from gardens, springs,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan sebab itu maka kami jadikan mereka (Firaun dan tenteranya) keluar meninggalkan kebun-kebun dan matair,

translations.en_sahih: And treasures and honorable station -
translations.en_yusufali: Treasures, and every kind of honourable position;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga khazanah-khazanah kekayaan serta tempat tinggal yang mulia.

translations.en_sahih: Thus. And We caused to inherit it the Children of Israel.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus it was, but We made the Children of Israel inheritors of such things.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah keadaannya; dan Kami jadikan semua peninggalan Firaun dan tenteranya milik Bani Israil sebagai pusaka.

translations.en_sahih: So they pursued them at sunrise.
translations.en_yusufali: So they pursued them at sunrise.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Firaun dan tenteranya pun mengejar mereka ketika matahari terbit.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَـٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma taraa aljamAAani qala ashabu moosa inna lamudrakoona

translations.en_sahih: And when the two companies saw one another, the companions of Moses said, "Indeed, we are to be overtaken!"
translations.en_yusufali: And when the two bodies saw each other, the people of Moses said: "We are sure to be overtaken."
translations.ms_basmeih: Setelah kedua-dua kumpulan itu nampak satu sama lain, berkatalah orang-orang Nabi Musa: "Sesungguhnya kita akan dapat ditawan".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kalla inna maAAiya rabbee sayahdeeni

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me."
translations.en_yusufali: (Moses) said: "By no means! my Lord is with me! Soon will He guide me!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Tidak! Jangan fikir (akan berlaku yang demikian)! Sesungguhnya aku sentiasa disertai oleh Tuhanku (dengan pemuliharaan dan pertolonganNya), Ia akan menunjuk jalan kepadaku".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Faawhayna ila moosa ani idrib biAAasaka albahra fainfalaqa fakana kullu firqin kaalttawdi alAAatheemi

translations.en_sahih: Then We inspired to Moses, "Strike with your staff the sea," and it parted, and each portion was like a great towering mountain.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We told Moses by inspiration: "Strike the sea with thy rod." So it divided, and each separate part became like the huge, firm mass of a mountain.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Kami wahyukan kepada Nabi Musa: "Pukulah laut itu dengan tongkatmu". (Setelah dipukul) maka terbelahlah laut itu (kepada beberapa bahagian), lalu menjadilah air tiap-tiap bahagian yang terbelah itu terangkat seperti gunung yang besar.

translations.en_sahih: And We advanced thereto the pursuers.
translations.en_yusufali: And We made the other party approach thither.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami dekatkan golongan yang lain itu ke situ.

translations.en_sahih: And We saved Moses and those with him, all together.
translations.en_yusufali: We delivered Moses and all who were with him;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami selamatkan Nabi Musa serta orang-orang yang bersama dengannya, semuanya.

translations.en_sahih: Then We drowned the others.
translations.en_yusufali: But We drowned the others.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami tenggelamkan golongan yang lain (yang mengejarnya).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya pada peristiwa yang demikian, terdapat satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Allah); dan (dalam pada itu), kebanyakkan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: And recite to them the news of Abraham,
translations.en_yusufali: And rehearse to them (something of) Abraham's story.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bacakanlah pula kepada mereka perihal Nabi Ibrahim.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma taAAbudoona

translations.en_sahih: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?"
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, he said to his father and his people: "What worship ye?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia berkata kepada bapanya dan kaumnya: "Apa yang kamu sembah?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo naAAbudu asnaman fanathallu laha AAakifeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "We worship idols, and we remain constantly in attendance on them."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami menyembah berhala-berhala, maka (kerana memuliakannya) kami berkekalan menyembahnya".

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate?
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Do they listen to you when ye call (on them)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim bertanya: "Adakah berhala-berhala itu mendengar kamu semasa kamu menyerunya?

translations.en_sahih: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Or do you good or harm?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Atau mereka dapat memberikan sesuatu yang ada manfaatnya kepada kamu ataupun menimpakan sesuatu bahaya?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo bal wajadna abaana kathalika yafAAaloona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Nay, but we found our fathers doing thus (what we do)."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "(Tidak satupun!) Bahkan kami dapati datuk nenek kami berbuat demikian".

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping,
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Do ye then see whom ye have been worshipping,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim berkata: "Sudahkah kamu berfikir sehingga nampak gunanya benda-benda yang kamu sembah itu? -

translations.en_sahih: You and your ancient forefathers?
translations.en_yusufali: "Ye and your fathers before you?-
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Yang sekian lama disembah oleh) kamu dan datuk nenek kamu yang dahulu?

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnahum AAaduwwun lee illa rabba alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds,
translations.en_yusufali: "For they are enemies to me; not so the Lord and Cherisher of the Worlds;
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Aku bertanya demikian) kerana sesungguhnya berhala-berhala itu ialah musuhKu, (aku tidak menyembah) melainkan Allah Tuhan sekalian alam;

translations.en_sahih: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me.
translations.en_yusufali: "Who created me, and it is He Who guides me;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tuhan yang menciptakan daku (dari tiada kepada ada), maka Dia lah yang memimpin dan memberi petunjuk kepadaku;

translations.en_sahih: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink.
translations.en_yusufali: "Who gives me food and drink,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan Tuhan yang Dia lah jua memberiku makan dan memberi minum,

translations.en_sahih: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me
translations.en_yusufali: "And when I am ill, it is He Who cures me;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan apabila aku sakit, maka Dia lah yang menyembuhkan penyakitku;

translations.en_sahih: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life
translations.en_yusufali: "Who will cause me to die, and then to life (again);
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (Dia lah) yang mematikan daku, kemudian Ia menghidupkan daku;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallathee atmaAAu an yaghfira lee khateeatee yawma alddeeni

translations.en_sahih: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense."
translations.en_yusufali: "And who, I hope, will forgive me my faults on the day of Judgment.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (Dia lah) yang aku harap-harapkan supaya mengampunkan dosaku pada hari kiamat;

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi hab lee hukman waalhiqnee bialssaliheena

translations.en_sahih: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: "O my Lord! bestow wisdom on me, and join me with the righteous;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Wahai Tuhanku, berikanlah daku ilmu pengetahuan ugama, dan hubungkanlah daku dengan orang-orang yang soleh;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WaijAAal lee lisana sidqin fee alakhireena

translations.en_sahih: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations.
translations.en_yusufali: "Grant me honourable mention on the tongue of truth among the latest (generations);
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan jadikanlah bagiku sebutan yang baik (nama yang harum) dalam kalangan orang-orang yang datang kemudian;

translations.en_sahih: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure.
translations.en_yusufali: "Make me one of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan jadikanlah daku dari orang-orang yang mewarisi Syurga Jannatun-Naiim;

ayahs.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waighfir liabee innahu kana mina alddalleena

translations.en_sahih: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray.
translations.en_yusufali: "Forgive my father, for that he is among those astray;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan ampunkanlah bagi bapaku, kerana sesungguhnya ia adalah dari orang-orang yang sesat;

translations.en_sahih: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected -
translations.en_yusufali: "And let me not be in disgrace on the Day when (men) will be raised up;-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan janganlah engkau hinakan daku pada hari makhluk-makhluk dibangkitkan hidup semula -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma la yanfaAAu malun wala banoona

translations.en_sahih: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children
translations.en_yusufali: "The Day whereon neither wealth nor sons will avail,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Hari yang padanya harta benda dan anak-pinak tidak dapat memberikan pertolongan sesuatu apapun,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man ata Allaha biqalbin saleemin

translations.en_sahih: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart."
translations.en_yusufali: "But only he (will prosper) that brings to Allah a sound heart;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kecuali (harta benda dan anak-pinak) orang-orang yang datang mengadap Allah dengan hati yang selamat sejahtera (dari syirik dan penyakit munafik);

translations.en_sahih: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: "To the righteous, the Garden will be brought near,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (pada hari itu) didekatkan Syurga bagi orang-orang yang bertaqwa,

translations.en_sahih: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators,
translations.en_yusufali: "And to those straying in Evil, the Fire will be placed in full view;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan diperlihatkan neraka jelas nyata kepada orang-orang yang sesat;

ayahs.arabic: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqeela lahum ayna ma kuntum taAAbudoona

translations.en_sahih: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
translations.en_yusufali: "And it shall be said to them: 'Where are the (gods) ye worshipped-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Serta dikatakan kepada mereka: ` Mana dia benda-benda yang kamu sembah dahulu -

ayahs.arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Min dooni Allahi hal yansuroonakum aw yantasiroona

translations.en_sahih: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?"
translations.en_yusufali: "'Besides Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?'
translations.ms_basmeih: ` Selain dari Allah? Dapatkah mereka menolong kamu atau menolong dirinya sendiri ? '

translations.en_sahih: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators
translations.en_yusufali: "Then they will be thrown headlong into the (Fire),- they and those straying in Evil,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Lalu mereka dihumbankan ke dalam neraka dengan tertiarap, jatuh bangun berulang-ulang, - mereka dan orang-orang yang sesat bersama,

translations.en_sahih: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together.
translations.en_yusufali: "And the whole hosts of Iblis together.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Termasuk juga bala tentera iblis semuanya.

translations.en_sahih: They will say while they dispute therein,
translations.en_yusufali: "They will say there in their mutual bickerings:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Mereka berkata, sambil bertengkar sesama sendiri dalam neraka:

ayahs.arabic: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: TaAllahi in kunna lafee dalalin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: "By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error
translations.en_yusufali: "'By Allah, we were truly in an error manifest,
translations.ms_basmeih: " ` Demi Allah! Sesungguhnya kami (semasa di dunia dahulu) adalah di dalam kesesatan yang jelas nyata,

translations.en_sahih: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: "'When we held you as equals with the Lord of the Worlds;
translations.ms_basmeih: " ` Kerana kami menyamakan kamu dengan Tuhan sekalian alam;

translations.en_sahih: And no one misguided us except the criminals.
translations.en_yusufali: "'And our seducers were only those who were steeped in guilt.
translations.ms_basmeih: " ` Dan tiadalah yang menyesatkan kami melainkan golongan yang berdosa.

translations.en_sahih: So now we have no intercessors
translations.en_yusufali: "'Now, then, we have none to intercede (for us),
translations.ms_basmeih: " ` Dengan sebab itu, tiadalah kami beroleh sesiapapun yang memberi pertolongan,

translations.en_sahih: And not a devoted friend.
translations.en_yusufali: "'Nor a single friend to feel (for us).
translations.ms_basmeih: " ` Dan tiadalah juga sahabat karib yang bertimbang rasa.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Falaw anna lana karratan fanakoona mina almumineena

translations.en_sahih: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers... "
translations.en_yusufali: "'Now if we only had a chance of return we shall truly be of those who believe!'"
translations.ms_basmeih: " ` Maka alangkah baiknya kalau kami dapat ke dunia sekali lagi, supaya kami menjadi dari orang-orang yang beriman. ' "

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this is a Sign but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya pada peristiwa yang demikian itu terdapat satu tanda (yang membukitkan keesaan Allah dan kekuasaanNya); dan dalam pada itu, kebanyakan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: The people of Noah denied the messengers
translations.en_yusufali: The people of Noah rejected the messengers.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Nabi Nuh telah mendustakan Rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada mereka.)

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum noohun ala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, their brother Noah said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika saudara mereka - Nabi Nuh, berkata kepada mereka: " Hendaknya kamu mematuhi suruhan Allah dan menjauhi laranganNya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: "I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku ini ialah Rasul yang amanah, (yang diutus oleh Allah) kepada kamu.

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "So fear Allah, and obey me.
translations.ms_basmeih: " Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: "No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak meminta kepada kamu sebarang upah mengenai apa yang aku sampaikan (dari Tuhanku); balasanku hanyalah terserah kepada Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me."
translations.en_yusufali: "So fear Allah, and obey me."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka dengan yang demikian, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku".

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]?"
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Shall we believe in thee when it is the meanest that follow thee?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Patutkah kami percaya kepadamu, sedang engkau semata-mata diikut oleh orang-orang yang rendah (pangkatnya dan hina pekerjaannya)?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala wama AAilmee bima kanoo yaAAmaloona

translations.en_sahih: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do?
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "And what do I know as to what they do?
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Nuh berkata: "Dan apalah ada kaitannya pengetahuanku dengan (pangkat dan) pekerjaan mereka?

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: In hisabuhum illa AAala rabbee law tashAAuroona

translations.en_sahih: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive.
translations.en_yusufali: "Their account is only with my Lord, if ye could (but) understand.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sebenarnya hitungan amal mereka hanya terserah kepada Tuhanku; kalaulah kamu menyedari dan memahaminya (kamu tidak berkata demikian).

translations.en_sahih: And I am not one to drive away the believers.
translations.en_yusufali: "I am not one to drive away those who believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak akan menghalau orang-orang yang beriman (daripada bercampur-gaul denganku).

translations.en_sahih: I am only a clear warner."
translations.en_yusufali: "I am sent only to warn plainly in public."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Aku ini hanyalah seorang Rasul pemberi amaran yang jelas nyata (kepada semua - tidak kira hina mulia)".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya noohu latakoonanna mina almarjoomeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "If thou desist not, O Noah! thou shalt be stoned (to death)."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (mengugut dengan) berkata: "Jika engkau tidak mahu berhenti (daripada menyiarkan ugamamu itu) wahai Nuh, sudah tentu engkau akan menjadi dari orang-orang yang direjam!"

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "O my Lord! truly my people have rejected me.
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Nuh berdoa dengan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku! Sesungguhnya kaumku telah mendustakan daku.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faiftah baynee wabaynahum fathan wanajjinee waman maAAiya mina almumineena

translations.en_sahih: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers."
translations.en_yusufali: "Judge Thou, then, between me and them openly, and deliver me and those of the Believers who are with me."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, hukumkanlah antaraku dengan mereka, dengan hukuman tegas (yang menegakkan yang benar dan melenyapkan yang salah), serta selamatkanlah daku dan orang-orang yang beriman yang bersama-sama denganku"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Faanjaynahu waman maAAahu fee alfulki almashhooni

translations.en_sahih: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship.
translations.en_yusufali: So We delivered him and those with him, in the Ark filled (with all creatures).
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami selamatkan dia dan orang-orang yang bersama-sama dengannya dalam bahtera yang penuh sarat (dengan berbagai makhluk).

translations.en_sahih: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones.
translations.en_yusufali: Thereafter We drowned those who remained behind.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian daripada itu, Kami tenggelamkan golongan (kafir) yang tinggal (tidak turut bersama dalam bahtera).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya pada peristiwa yang demikian, terdapat satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Allah); dan dalam pada itu, kebanyakan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: 'Aad denied the messengers
translations.en_yusufali: The 'Ad (people) rejected the messengers.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Aad telah mendustakan Rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada mereka).

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum hoodun ala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: When their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, their brother Hud said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika saudara mereka - Nabi Hud, berkata kepada mereka: "Hendaknya kamu mematuhi perintah Allah dan menjauhi laranganNya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: "I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku ini seorang Rasul yang amanah, (yang diutus oleh Allah) kepada kamu.

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: "No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak meminta kepada kamu sebarang upah mengenai apa yang aku sampaikan (dari Tuhanku); balasanku hanyalah terserah kepada Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves,
translations.en_yusufali: "Do ye build a landmark on every high place to amuse yourselves?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Patutkah kamu mendirikan pada tiap-tiap tempat yang tinggi bangunan-bangunan yang tersergam, padahal kamu tidak membuatnya dengan sesuatu tujuan yang baik.

translations.en_sahih: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally?
translations.en_yusufali: "And do ye get for yourselves fine buildings in the hope of living therein (for ever)?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kamu pula bersusah payah mendirikan istana-istana dan benteng-benteng yang kukuh dengan harapan hendak kekal hidup selama-lamanya?

translations.en_sahih: And when you strike, you strike as tyrants.
translations.en_yusufali: "And when ye exert your strong hand, do ye do it like men of absolute power?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan apabila kamu memukul atau menyeksa, kamu melakukan yang demikian dengan kejam bengis?

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "Now fear Allah, and obey me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah dan taatlah kepadaku.

translations.en_sahih: And fear He who provided you with that which you know,
translations.en_yusufali: "Yea, fear Him Who has bestowed on you freely all that ye know.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan berbaktilah kamu kepada Allah yang telah menolong kamu dengan pemberian nikmat-nikmatNya yang kamu sedia mengetahuinya.

translations.en_sahih: Provided you with grazing livestock and children
translations.en_yusufali: "Freely has He bestowed on you cattle and sons,-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Diberinya kamu binatang-binatang ternak (yang biak) serta anak-pinak (yang ramai),

translations.en_sahih: And gardens and springs.
translations.en_yusufali: "And Gardens and Springs.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan taman-taman (yang indah permai) serta matair-matair (yang mengalir).

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Innee akhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day."
translations.en_yusufali: "Truly I fear for you the Penalty of a Great Day."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku takut, (bahawa) kamu akan ditimpa azab seksa hari yang besar (huru-haranya)".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo sawaon AAalayna awaAAathta am lam takun mina alwaAAitheena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors.
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "It is the same to us whether thou admonish us or be not among (our) admonishers!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Sama sahaja bagi kami, sama ada engkau beri nasihat pengajaran, atau engkau tidak menjadi dari orang-orang yang memberi nasihat pengajaran.

translations.en_sahih: This is not but the custom of the former peoples,
translations.en_yusufali: "This is no other than a customary device of the ancients,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Segala apa (yang engkau katakan) ini, hanyalah adat kebiasaan orang-orang dahulu-kala,

translations.en_sahih: And we are not to be punished."
translations.en_yusufali: "And we are not the ones to receive Pains and Penalties!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kami pula tidak akan diseksa".

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faahlaknahum inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: So they rejected him, and We destroyed them. Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Akhirnya mereka mendustakan Rasul itu, lalu Kami binasakan mereka. Sesungguhnya pada peristiwa yang demikian, terdapat satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Allah); dan dalam pada itu, kebanyakan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: Thamud denied the messengers
translations.en_yusufali: The Thamud (people) rejected the messengers.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Thamud telah mendustakan Rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada mereka),

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum salihun ala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, their brother Salih said to them: "Will you not fear (Allah)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika saudara mereka - Nabi Soleh, berkata kepada mereka: "Hendaknya kamu mematuhi perintah Allah dan menjauhi laranganNya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: "I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku ini Rasul yang amanah, (yang diutus oleh Allah) kepada kamu.

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "So fear Allah, and obey me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: "No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak meminta kepada kamu sebarang upah mengenai apa yang aku sampaikan (dari Tuhanku), balasanku hanyalah terserah kepada Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death],
translations.en_yusufali: "Will ye be left secure, in (the enjoyment of) all that ye have here?-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Adakah (kamu fikir), bahawa kamu akan dibiarkan sentiasa bersenang-senang dalam nikmat-nikmat yang ada di dunia ini? -

translations.en_sahih: Within gardens and springs
translations.en_yusufali: "Gardens and Springs,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Di dalam taman-taman (yang indah permai), dan matair-matair (yang mengalir),

translations.en_sahih: And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit?
translations.en_yusufali: "And corn-fields and date-palms with spathes near breaking (with the weight of fruit)?
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kebun-kebun tanaman serta pohon-pohon tamar (kurma) yang buah mayangnya halus lembut?

translations.en_sahih: And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill.
translations.en_yusufali: "And ye carve houses out of (rocky) mountains with great skill.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kamu memahat sebahagian dari gunung-ganang sebagai tempat tinggal - dengan bijak dan bersungguh-sungguh?

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "But fear Allah and obey me;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku;

translations.en_sahih: And do not obey the order of the transgressors,
translations.en_yusufali: "And follow not the bidding of those who are extravagant,-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan janganlah kamu taati perintah orang-orang yang melampaui batas, -

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona

translations.en_sahih: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend."
translations.en_yusufali: "Who make mischief in the land, and mend not (their ways)."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Iaitu orang-orang yang melakukan kerosakan di bumi dan tidak membuat kebaikan".

translations.en_sahih: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Thou art only one of those bewitched!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Sesungguhnya engkau ini hanyalah salah seorang dari golongan yang kena sihir!

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma anta illa basharun mithluna fati biayatin in kunta mina alssadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful."
translations.en_yusufali: "Thou art no more than a mortal like us: then bring us a Sign, if thou tellest the truth!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Engkau hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kami; oleh itu, bawakanlah satu tanda (mukjizat) jika betul engkau dari orang-orang yang benar".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hathihi naqatun laha shirbun walakum shirbu yawmin maAAloomin

translations.en_sahih: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Here is a she-camel: she has a right of watering, and ye have a right of watering, (severally) on a day appointed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Soleh berkata: "Ini adalah seekor unta betina, (di antara cara-cara hidupnya ialah) air kamu hendaklah menjadi bahagian minumnya sehari, dan bahagian kamu sehari, menurut giliran yang tertentu.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tamassooha bisooin fayakhuthakum AAathabu yawmin AAatheemin

translations.en_sahih: And do not touch her with harm, lest you be seized by the punishment of a terrible day."
translations.en_yusufali: "Touch her not with harm, lest the Penalty of a Great Day seize you."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan janganlah kamu menyentuhnya dengan sesuatu yang menyakitinya; (jika kamu menyakitinya) maka akibatnya kamu akan dibinasakan oleh azab seksa hari yang besar (huru-haranya)".

translations.en_sahih: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful.
translations.en_yusufali: But they ham-strung her: then did they become full of regrets.
translations.ms_basmeih: Akhirnya mereka menikam mati unta itu, kemudian mereka menyesal (setelah melihat kedatangan bala bencana).

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathahumu alAAathabu inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: And the punishment seized them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: But the Penalty seized them. Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu mereka ditimpa azab yang membinasakan. Sesungguhnya peristiwa yang demikian mengandungi satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Allah); dan dalam pada itu, kebanyakan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: The people of Lot denied the messengers
translations.en_yusufali: The people of Lut rejected the messengers.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Nabi Lut telah mendustakan Rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada mereka).

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum lootun ala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: When their brother Lot said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, their brother Lut said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika saudara mereka - Nabi Lut, berkata kepada mereka: "Hendaknya kamu mematuhi perintah Allah dan menjauhi laranganNya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: "I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku ini Rasul yang amanah, (yang diutus oleh Allah) kepada kamu.

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: "No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the lord of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak meminta kepada kamu sebarang upah mengenai apa yang aku sampaikan (dari Tuhanku); balasanku hanyalah terserah kepada Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: Do you approach males among the worlds
translations.en_yusufali: "Of all the creatures in the world, will ye approach males,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Patutkah kamu melakukan hubungan jenis dengan lelaki dari kalangan manusia,

ayahs.arabic: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Watatharoona ma khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwajikum bal antum qawmun AAadoona

translations.en_sahih: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing."
translations.en_yusufali: "And leave those whom Allah has created for you to be your mates? Nay, ye are a people transgressing (all limits)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan kamu tinggalkan apa yang diciptakan oleh Tuhan kamu untuk kamu (melakukan hubungan yang halal) dari badan isteri-isteri kamu? (Kamu orang-orang yang bersalah) bahkan kamu adalah kaum yang melampaui batas (keinginan kebanyaKan haiwan)!"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya lootu latakoonanna mina almukhrajeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "If thou desist not, O Lut! thou wilt assuredly be cast out!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Sesungguhnya jika engkau tidak berhenti wahai Lut (daripada mencaci dan menyalahkan kami), nescaya engkau akan diusir keluar!"

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it].
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "I do detest your doings."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Lut berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku dari orang-orang yang bencikan perbuatan kamu yang keji itu".

translations.en_sahih: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do."
translations.en_yusufali: "O my Lord! deliver me and my family from such things as they do!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Nabi Lut berdoa): "Wahai Tuhanku, selamatkanlah daku dan keluarga serta pengikut-pengikutku dari apa yang dilakukan oleh golongan (yang jahat) itu."

translations.en_sahih: So We saved him and his family, all,
translations.en_yusufali: So We delivered him and his family,- all
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami selamatkan dia dan keluarganya serta pengikut-pengikutnya - semuanya

translations.en_sahih: Except an old woman among those who remained behind.
translations.en_yusufali: Except an old woman who lingered behind.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali seorang perempuan tua tertinggal dalam golongan yang kena azab itu.

translations.en_sahih: Then We destroyed the others.
translations.en_yusufali: But the rest We destroyed utterly.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami hancurkan yang lain (yang menentang Nabi Lut).

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena

translations.en_sahih: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.
translations.en_yusufali: We rained down on them a shower (of brimstone): and evil was the shower on those who were admonished (but heeded not)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami hujani mereka dengan hujan (azab yang membinasakan); maka amatlah buruknya hujan azab yang menimpa kaum yang telah diberi amaran.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya peristiwa yang demikian, mengandungi satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Allah); dan dalam pada itu, kebanyakan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: The companions of the thicket denied the messengers
translations.en_yusufali: The Companions of the Wood rejected the messengers.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) penduduk "Aikah" telah mendustakan Rasul-rasul (yang diutus kepada mereka).

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum shuAAaybun ala tattaqoona

translations.en_sahih: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, Shu'aib said to them: "Will ye not fear (Allah)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika Nabi Syuaib berkata kepada mereka: "Hendaknya kamu mematuhi perintah Allah dan menjauhi laranganNya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: "I am to you a messenger worthy of all trust.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya aku ini Rasul yang amanah, (yang diutus oleh Allah) kepada kamu.

translations.en_sahih: So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.en_yusufali: "So fear Allah and obey me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, takutilah kamu akan (kemurkaan) Allah, dan taatlah kepadaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: "No reward do I ask of you for it: my reward is only from the Lord of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak meminta kepada kamu sebarang upah mengenai apa yang aku sampaikan (dari Tuhanku); balasanku hanyalah terserah kepada Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Awfoo alkayla wala takoonoo mina almukhsireena

translations.en_sahih: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss.
translations.en_yusufali: "Give just measure, and cause no loss (to others by fraud).
translations.ms_basmeih: "Hendaklah kamu menyempurnakan sukatan cupak-gantang, dan janganlah kamu menjadi golongan yang merugikan orang lain.

translations.en_sahih: And weigh with an even balance.
translations.en_yusufali: "And weigh with scales true and upright.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan timbanglah dengan neraca yang betul timbangannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tabkhasoo alnnasa ashyaahum wala taAAthaw fee alardi mufsideena

translations.en_sahih: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption.
translations.en_yusufali: "And withhold not things justly due to men, nor do evil in the land, working mischief.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan janganlah kamu mengurangi hak-hak orang ramai, dan janganlah kamu bermaharajalela melakukan kerosakan di bumi.

translations.en_sahih: And fear He who created you and the former creation."
translations.en_yusufali: "And fear Him Who created you and (who created) the generations before (you)"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan (sebaliknya) berbaktilah kepada Allah yang telah menciptakan kamu dan umat-umat yang telah lalu".

translations.en_sahih: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Thou art only one of those bewitched!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Sesungguhnya engkau ini (hai Syuaib) hanyalah salah seorang dari golongan yang kena sihir.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama anta illa basharun mithluna wain nathunnuka lamina alkathibeena

translations.en_sahih: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars.
translations.en_yusufali: "Thou art no more than a mortal like us, and indeed we think thou art a liar!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan engkau hanyalah seorang manusia seperti kami; dan sesungguhnya kami fikir engkau ini dari orang-orang yang dusta.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faasqit AAalayna kisafan mina alssamai in kunta mina alssadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful."
translations.en_yusufali: "Now cause a piece of the sky to fall on us, if thou art truthful!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, gugurkanlah atas kami ketul-ketul (yang membinasakan) dari langit, jika betul engkau dari orang-orang yang benar!"

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "My Lord knows best what ye do."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Syuaib berkata: "Tuhanku lebih mengetahui akan apa yang kamu lakukan".

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faakhathahum AAathabu yawmi alththullati innahu kana AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

translations.en_sahih: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day.
translations.en_yusufali: But they rejected him. Then the punishment of a day of overshadowing gloom seized them, and that was the Penalty of a Great Day.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka mereka tetap juga mendustakannya, lalu mereka ditimpa azab seksa hari awan mendung; sesungguhnya kejadian itu adalah merupakan azab seksa hari yang amat besar - (huru-haranya).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in that is a Sign: but most of them do not believe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya peristiwa yang demikian, mengandungi satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Allah); dan dalam pada itu, kebanyakan mereka tidak juga mahu beriman.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily thy Lord is He, the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), Dia lah sahaja yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, the Qur'an is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily this is a Revelation from the Lord of the Worlds:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Al-Quran (yang di antara isinya kisah-kisah yang tersebut) adalah diturunkan oleh Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: The Trustworthy Spirit has brought it down
translations.en_yusufali: With it came down the spirit of Faith and Truth-
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia dibawa turun oleh malaikat Jibril yang amanah.

translations.en_sahih: Upon your heart, [O Muhammad] - that you may be of the warners -
translations.en_yusufali: To thy heart and mind, that thou mayest admonish.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ke dalam hatimu, supaya engkau (wahai Muhammad) menjadi seorang dari pemberi-pemberi ajaran dan amaran (kepada umat manusia).

translations.en_sahih: In a clear Arabic language.
translations.en_yusufali: In the perspicuous Arabic tongue.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ia diturunkan) dengan bahasa Arab yang fasih serta terang nyata.

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples.
translations.en_yusufali: Without doubt it is (announced) in the mystic Books of former peoples.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Al-Quran (tersebut juga perihalnya dan sebahagian dari pengajaran-pengajarannya) di dalam Kitab-kitab ugama orang-orang yang telah lalu.

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yakun lahum ayatan an yaAAlamahu AAulamao banee israeela

translations.en_sahih: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel?
translations.en_yusufali: Is it not a Sign to them that the Learned of the Children of Israel knew it (as true)?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tidakkah mereka yang musyrik sedarkan kebenaran itu) dan tidakkah menjadi satu keterangan kepada mereka bahawa pendita-pendita ugama Bani lsrail mengetahui akan kebenaran Al-Quran itu?

translations.en_sahih: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners
translations.en_yusufali: Had We revealed it to any of the non-Arabs,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sekiranya Kami turunkan Al-Quran kepada setengah orang yang bukan Arab, yang tidak tahu membaca Arab,

ayahs.arabic: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaraahu AAalayhim ma kanoo bihi mumineena

translations.en_sahih: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it.
translations.en_yusufali: And had he recited it to them, they would not have believed in it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia (dikurniakan Tuhan dapat) membacakannya kepada mereka, mereka tetap juga tidak mahu percayakan bacaan itu daripada Tuhan.

translations.en_sahih: Thus have We inserted disbelief into the hearts of the criminals.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus have We caused it to enter the hearts of the sinners.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah Kami masukkan perasaan (kufur ingkar) itu ke dalam hati orang-orang yang melakukan dosa - tidak percayakan Al-Quran.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yuminoona bihi hatta yarawoo alAAathaba alaleema

translations.en_sahih: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: They will not believe in it until they see the grievous Penalty;
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak beriman kepada Al-Quran sehingga mereka melihat azab yang tidak terperi sakitnya,
