translations.en_sahih: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not.
translations.en_yusufali: But the (Penalty) will come to them of a sudden, while they perceive it not;
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu azab itu datang menimpa mereka secara mengejut, dengan tidak mereka menyedarinya.

translations.en_sahih: And they will say, "May we be reprieved?"
translations.en_yusufali: Then they will say: "Shall we be respited?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (pada saat itu) mereka akan berkata (dengan menyesal): "Dapatkah kiranya kami diberi tempoh?"

translations.en_sahih: So for Our punishment are they impatient?
translations.en_yusufali: Do they then ask for Our Penalty to be hastened on?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kalaulah demikian keadaan mereka) maka patutkah mereka meminta disegerakan azab Kami?

translations.en_sahih: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou? If We do let them enjoy (this life) for a few years,
translations.ms_basmeih: Bagaimana fikiranmu (wahai Muhammad)? Jika Kami berikan mereka menikmati kesenangan bertahun-tahun,

translations.en_sahih: And then there came to them that which they were promised?
translations.en_yusufali: Yet there comes to them at length the (Punishment) which they were promised!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian mereka didatangi azab seksa yang dijanjikan kepada mereka,

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yumattaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided.
translations.en_yusufali: It will profit them not that they enjoyed (this life)!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tentulah) kesenangan yang mereka nikmati bertahun-tahun itu tidak dapat memberikan mereka sebarang pertolongan.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa laha munthiroona

translations.en_sahih: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners
translations.en_yusufali: Never did We destroy a population, but had its warners -
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiadalah Kami membinasakan mana-mana negeri (yang telah dibinasakan itu), melainkan setelah diutus kepadanya lebih dahulu, Rasul-rasul pemberi amaran.

translations.en_sahih: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust.
translations.en_yusufali: By way of reminder; and We never are unjust.
translations.ms_basmeih: Memperingatkan mereka; dan Kami tidak sekali-kali berlaku zalim.

translations.en_sahih: And the devils have not brought the revelation down.
translations.en_yusufali: No evil ones have brought down this (Revelation):
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Al-Quran itu pula tidak sekali-kali dibawa turun oleh Syaitan-syaitan.

translations.en_sahih: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able.
translations.en_yusufali: It would neither suit them nor would they be able (to produce it).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tidak layak bagi Syaitan-syaitan itu berbuat demikian, dan mereka juga tidak akan dapat melakukannya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed.
translations.en_yusufali: Indeed they have been removed far from even (a chance of) hearing it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya mereka dihalang sama sekali daripada mendengar wahyu yang dibawa oleh Malaikat.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fatakoona mina almuAAaththabeena

translations.en_sahih: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished.
translations.en_yusufali: So call not on any other god with Allah, or thou wilt be among those under the Penalty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka janganlah engkau (wahai Muhammad) menyembah tuhan yang lain bersama-sama Allah, akibatnya engkau akan menjadi dari golongan yang dikenakan azab seksa.

translations.en_sahih: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred.
translations.en_yusufali: And admonish thy nearest kinsmen,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berilah peringatan serta amaran kepada kaum kerabatmu yang dekat.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waikhfid janahaka limani ittabaAAaka mina almumineena

translations.en_sahih: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers.
translations.en_yusufali: And lower thy wing to the Believers who follow thee.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan hendaklah engkau merendah diri kepada pengikut-pengikutmu dari orang-orang yang beriman.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fain AAasawka faqul innee bareeon mimma taAAmaloona

translations.en_sahih: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing."
translations.en_yusufali: Then if they disobey thee, say: "I am free (of responsibility) for what ye do!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian jika mereka berlaku ingkar kepadamu, maka katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya aku berlepas diri dari apa yang kamu lakukan!"

translations.en_sahih: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
translations.en_yusufali: And put thy trust on the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berserahlah kepada Allah Yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani,

translations.en_sahih: Who sees you when you arise
translations.en_yusufali: Who seeth thee standing forth (in prayer),
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang melihatmu semasa engkau berdiri (mengerjakan sembahyang),

translations.en_sahih: And your movement among those who prostrate.
translations.en_yusufali: And thy movements among those who prostrate themselves,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (melihat) gerak-gerimu di antara orang-orang yang sujud.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
translations.en_yusufali: For it is He Who heareth and knoweth all things.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Dia lah jua yang Maha Mendengar, lagi Maha Mengetahui.

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal onabbiokum AAala man tanazzalu alshshayateenu

translations.en_sahih: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?
translations.en_yusufali: Shall I inform you, (O people!), on whom it is that the evil ones descend?
translations.ms_basmeih: Mahukah, Aku khabarkan kepada kamu, kepada siapakah Syaitan-syaitan itu selalu turun?

translations.en_sahih: They descend upon every sinful liar.
translations.en_yusufali: They descend on every lying, wicked person,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka selalu turun kepada tiap-tiap pendusta yang berdosa,

translations.en_sahih: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars.
translations.en_yusufali: (Into whose ears) they pour hearsay vanities, and most of them are liars.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang mendengar bersungguh-sungguh (apa yang disampaikan oleh Syaitan-syaitan itu), sedang kebanyakan beritanya adalah dusta.

translations.en_sahih: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them;
translations.en_yusufali: And the Poets,- It is those straying in Evil, who follow them:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Ahli-ahli syair itu, diturut oleh golongan yang sesat - tidak berketentuan hala.

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara annahum fee kulli wadin yaheemoona

translations.en_sahih: Do you not see that in every valley they roam
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou not that they wander distracted in every valley?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah engkau melihat bahawa mereka merayau-rayau dengan tidak berketentuan hala dalam tiap-tiap lembah (khayal dan angan-angan kosong)?

translations.en_sahih: And that they say what they do not do? -
translations.en_yusufali: And that they say what they practise not?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa mereka memperkatakan apa yang mereka tidak melakukannya?

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati wathakaroo Allaha katheeran waintasaroo min baAAdi ma thulimoo wasayaAAlamu allatheena thalamoo ayya munqalabin yanqaliboona

translations.en_sahih: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned.
translations.en_yusufali: Except those who believe, work righteousness, engage much in the remembrance of Allah, and defend themselves only after they are unjustly attacked. And soon will the unjust assailants know what vicissitudes their affairs will take!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh (dari kalangan penyair-penyair itu), dan mereka pula mengingati Allah banyak-banyak, serta mereka membela diri sesudah mereka dianiaya. Dan (ingatlah), orang-orang yang melakukan sebarang kezaliman, akan mengetahui kelak, ke tempat mana, mereka akan kembali.
